summary: Calibrated the nightly `just coverage` gate from an unreachable 95% workspace line threshold to a documented 78% baseline floor, based on the measured current 78.84% total line coverage with app main entrypoints ignored. Documented that future increases should be explicit ratchet nodes.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Record evidence for the failing 95% policy.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-nightly-coverage-baseline-ratchet/coverage-95-failure.log records the 95% llvm-cov command exiting with code 1 after writing lcov.info.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Calibrate just coverage to a documented current baseline floor that does not exceed the measured baseline.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: justfile defines coverage_line_floor := "78" and `nix develop -c just coverage` passed with --fail-under-lines 78.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Document future increases as explicit ratchet nodes.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: docs/ENGINEERING.md and evidence/m4-nightly-coverage-baseline-ratchet/notes.md document that future coverage floor increases should be explicit ratchet nodes with fresh evidence.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Do not change product QUIC/decode/render/presentation/latency claims.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Only coverage tooling, engineering coverage policy, and node evidence/report files were changed.

commandsRun.command: nix develop -c cargo llvm-cov nextest --workspace --all-features --ignore-filename-regex 'apps/.*/src/main\.rs' --fail-under-lines 95 --lcov --output-path lcov.info

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node only calibrates the repository coverage gate. Linux Nix coverage validation was run locally.
